title: cyperus metallorum
side_effects: Cyperus metallorum can have side effects if used improperly, such as liver damage, seizures, and even respiratory failure in severe cases. Prolonged use or excessive consumption of the plant's extracts can lead to headaches, dizziness, and stomach ulcers. In rare instances, it may also cause allergic reactions, such as skin rashes or anaphylaxis, which can be life-threatening. If not used under the guidance of a medical professional, Cyperus metallorum can pose significant risks to an individual's health and well-being.
